memoryArtifacts.headline:
Sir John Touchet Of Markeaton
(25 July 1327 – 22 June 1371)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Twenty-two years of age when he succeeded his father. Was in the wars of France, and at the relief of Aquillon. 

And in the 25th of Edward III., doing his homage, had livery of his lands in Co. Salop …

zh.Markeaton, Derbyshire, England: 英國德比夏爾馬可亞頓
zh.Heighley Castle, Madeley, Staffordshire,: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾馬德勒
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Touchet於1327年7月27日出生在英國德比夏爾馬可亞頓時，他的父親Thomas Touchet III29歲，母親Joan Tattenhall25歲。他和Joan de Audley至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於大約1362年1月10日在英國德比夏爾享年34歲。

zh-hans.Markeaton, Derbyshire, England: 英国德比夏爾馬可亞頓
zh-hans.Heighley Castle, Madeley, Staffordshire,: 英国英格兰斯塔福爾馬德勒
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Touchet于1327年7月27日出生在英国德比夏爾馬可亞頓时，他的父亲Thomas Touchet III29岁，母亲Joan Tattenhall25岁。他和Joan de Audley至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于大约1362年1月10日在英国德比夏爾享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Touchet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Anastasie, Denys, Evest, Minos, Rodolph, Vernice.
French: topographic name for someone who lived by a small grove, from a diminutive of Old French toche ‘grove’.
History: René Touchet from Thorigné-d'Anjou in Maine-et-Loire, France, married Marie Caillé in Saint-Laurent, Île-de-Montreal, QC, in 1746.

variants.name: Touchette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Marcel, Pierre, Armand, Collette, Euclide, Henri, Hilaire, Huguette.
Altered form of French Touchet , reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Touchet was born on 27 July 1327, in Markeaton, Derbyshire, England, his father, Thomas Touchet III, was 29 and his mother, Joan Tattenhall, was 25. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Joan de Audley. He died about 10 January 1362, in Derbyshire, England, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Touchet est né le 27 juillet 1327, à Markeaton, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Touchet III, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Joan Tattenhall, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Joan de Audley. Il est décédé environ 10 janvier 1362, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Touchet am 27. Juli 1327 in Markeaton, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Touchet III 29 und seine Mutter Joan Tattenhall 25. Er hatte mit Joan de Audley mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 10. Januar 1362 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Derbyshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Touchet è nato il il 27 luglio 1327 nel Markeaton, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Touchet III, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Joan Tattenhall, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Joan de Audley. Morì circa 10 gennaio 1362, nel Derbyshire, England, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Touchetが1327年7月27日にイギリスデルブイシュアイアマーケアトンで生まれた時，父Thomas Touchet IIIは29歳，母Joan Tattenhallは25歳であった。彼はJoan de Audleyとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1362年1月10日にイギリスデルブイシュアイアで34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Touchet(이)가 1327년 7월 27일 영국 더비실르 마크이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Touchet III(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Tattenhall(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Joan de Audley(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1362년 1월 10일 영국 더비실르에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.27 July 1327–10 Jan 1362: 1327 оны Долоодугаар сарын 27–ойролцоогоор 1362 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 10

pt.27 July 1327–10 Jan 1362: 27 de julho de 1327–aproximadamente 10 de janeiro de 1362
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Touchet nasceu em 27 de julho de 1327, em Markeaton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Touchet III, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Joan Tattenhall, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Joan de Audley. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 10 de janeiro de 1362, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 34 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Touchet родился 27 июля 1327 г. в местности маркитон, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Touchet III было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Tattenhall, 25. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Joan de Audley. Он умер около 10 января 1362 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 34 лет.

es.27 July 1327–10 Jan 1362: 27 de julio de 1327–aproximadamente 10 de enero de 1362
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Touchet nació el 27 de julio de 1327, en Markeaton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Touchet III, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Joan Tattenhall, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Joan de Audley. Murió aproximadamente 10 de enero de 1362, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 34 años.
